The edge is honed to razor-sharpness despite its weight, and beautiful silver embossing seems to capture the light and draw the eye. A thin chain hangs from the hilt, although the charms that should be attached to it appear to have gone missing."

rows.original: A gilded war-scythe wielded by the high priestess of the Winter City, as much a symbol of her office as a tool of combat... though it is very much a devastating weapon, if unwieldy.
rows.translation: 冬之城的大祭司所持有的这把镀金战镰，既是她职位的象征，也是战斗中的武器……不过，如果使用不当，它确实会变成一件极具破坏力的武器。
rows.raw: "A gilded war-scythe wielded by the high priestess of the Winter City, as much a symbol of her office as a tool of combat... though it is very much a devastating weapon, if unwieldy."

rows.original: A bronze-bladed glaive with a haft made from the wood of a tree that was struck dead by a lightning bolt — a sure gift from Sorra, the goddess of storms and skies. The weapon crackles with electric energy in your hand, ready to be unleashed.
rows.translation: 这把青铜刀刃的战刃，其刀柄是由被闪电击死的树木制成的——这无疑是风暴与天空女神索拉送给你的礼物。握在手中时，这种武器会散发着电芒，随时准备被释放出来。
rows.raw: "A bronze-bladed glaive with a haft made from the wood of a tree that was struck dead by a lightning bolt — a sure gift from Sorra, the goddess of storms and skies. The weapon crackles with electric energy in your hand, ready to be unleashed."

rows.original: Kasyrra's massive two-headed axe, engraved with crackling blue arcane runes. Impossibly heavy, clearly made for someone of minotaur stature, yet the demoness swings it around with ease.
rows.translation: 卡西拉那把巨大的双头斧，上面刻满了闪烁着蓝光的神秘符文。这把斧头重得不可思议，显然是为身材如牛头人般魁梧的人打造的，然而这位恶魔女却能轻松地挥舞它。
rows.raw: "Kasyrra's massive two-headed axe, engraved with crackling blue arcane runes. Impossibly heavy, clearly made for someone of minotaur stature, yet the demoness swings it around with ease."

rows.original: A greataxe forged deep in the mountains of Zhenna, a land steeped in dark primordial magics. Though perhaps it was once mundane, a common woodsman's axe, the bronze blade is now encrusted with the sap of an ancient wyld tree hewn down by human hands. Velun unleashed a terrible wrath upon the greedy men that sought the lifeblood of a fey for their own profits, but even the Green Lord's magic could not fully wipe away the sin stained on this weapon's blade.
rows.translation: 这把巨斧是在赞纳山脉深处锻造的，那里充满了黑暗的原始魔法。虽然它原本可能只是一把普通的伐木斧，但如今，它的青铜刀刃上已经覆盖着人类砍伐下来的古老野树的树液。维伦向那些为了一己私利而试图夺取精灵生命之力的贪婪之徒发起了猛烈的报复，然而，就连绿之主的魔法也无法彻底抹去这把武器刀刃上留下的罪孽痕迹。
rows.raw: "A greataxe forged deep in the mountains of Zhenna, a land steeped in dark primordial magics. Though perhaps it was once mundane, a common woodsman's axe, the bronze blade is now encrusted with the sap of an ancient wyld tree hewn down by human hands. Velun unleashed a terrible wrath upon the greedy men that sought the lifeblood of a fey for their own profits, but even the Green Lord's magic could not fully wipe away the sin stained on this weapon's blade."

rows.original: A short spear formed from the remnant corruption that sloughed off of Chieftain Taldahs' body. It wriggles and writhes unnaturally, as if it seeks flesh to penetrate and corrupt. Just touching it gives you a feel of [pc.isDK|excitement|dirtiness], a sure sign of its perverse taint.
rows.translation: 这支由酋长塔尔达斯身上脱落的腐烂物质形成的短矛，会以一种异常的方式扭动、蠕动，仿佛在寻找可以穿透并腐蚀的肉体。仅仅触碰到它，你就会感受到那种…… [pc.isDK|兴奋感|肮脏]这无疑是它那种病态本质的明显体现。
rows.raw: "A short spear formed from the remnant corruption that sloughed off of Chieftain Taldahs' body. It wriggles and writhes unnaturally, as if it seeks flesh to penetrate and corrupt. Just touching it gives you a feel of [pc.isDK|excitement|dirtiness], a sure sign of its perverse taint."

rows.original:
The half-bow — a shortbow suited for someone of your small stature. Not as impressive as [silly|Azami's|Ishida-San's] azusa-yumi, but still it has been yours ever since you were a kit. While your mother favored the naginata and you learned the forms of that weapon anyway, you've always felt more at home with string and fletching. Archery, after all, is still a respectable calling for a kitsune.

        ...Now today, you put your life in the hands of your weapon and your training.
rows.translation:
半弓——这种短弓非常适合你这样的身材。不过，它的威慑力显然没有…… [silly|Azami的|石田先生的] 梓由美，但从你还是只只小狐狸的时候起，这些武器就已经属于你了。虽然你的母亲更喜欢长刀，而你也确实学习了那种武器的使用方法，但你对弓箭始终有着更深厚的感情。毕竟，对于一只狐狸来说，射箭仍然是一份值得尊敬的职业。

……而今天，你将自己的生命交到了这些武器和自己的训练成果手中。
rows.raw:
"
        The half-bow — a shortbow suited for someone of your small stature. Not as impressive as [silly|Azami's|Ishida-San's] azusa-yumi, but still it has been yours ever since you were a kit. While your mother favored the naginata and you learned the forms of that weapon anyway, you've always felt more at home with string and fletching. Archery, after all, is still a respectable calling for a kitsune.

        ...Now today, you put your life in the hands of your weapon and your training."

rows.original:
By kitsune custom and tradition, the glaive is the quintessential woman's weapon, and doubly so for someone with your lineage. Ever since you were a girl, your mother painstakingly trained you in the use of the naginata, mornings upon mornings going through the forms... 

        ... And today, that training holds your life in the balance.
rows.translation:
根据狐族的习俗与传统，长刀是女性最理想的武器，而对于像你这样拥有高贵血统的人来说，这种武器更是不可或缺。从你还是个小女孩的时候起，你的母亲就孜孜不倦地教你如何使用长刀，一天又一天地重复那些训练动作……

……而今天，正是这些训练在关键时刻挽救了你的生命。
rows.raw: "By kitsune custom and tradition, the glaive is the quintessential woman's weapon, and doubly so for someone with your lineage. Ever since you were a girl, your mother painstakingly trained you in the use of the naginata, mornings upon mornings going through the forms... \n\n        ... And today, that training holds your life in the balance."

rows.original: A retractable silver rod with a ruby affixed to either end, used as a spell focus. Whatever magic it had originally stored has long since been discharged, leaving it an empty but nevertheless useful tool.
rows.translation: 一根可伸缩的银棒，两端各镶嵌着一颗红宝石，被用作施法媒介。无论它最初储存了什么魔法，那些力量早已被释放殆尽，如今它虽然已经空了，但仍然是一种有用的工具。
rows.raw: "\n        A retractable silver rod with a ruby affixed to either end, used as a spell focus. Whatever magic it had originally stored has long since been discharged, leaving it an empty but nevertheless useful tool."

rows.original: A light-colored wood staff about five feet long, multiple mushroom caps bloom out across its bottom and tip. Each mushroom blends into a beautiful array of colors cast over a thick moss, stretching up its length until meeting a wide-brimmed cap. Tucked just beneath the cap out of sight is a magical focus, perfect for magic users. Special Effect: Allows the use of Summon Sporeling.
rows.translation: 一根长约五英尺的浅色木杖，其底部和顶端都长出了多个蘑菇状的结构。每个“蘑菇”都呈现出绚丽的色彩，这些色彩覆盖在厚厚的苔藓之上，一直延伸到木杖的顶端，那里还有一个宽边帽状的结构。而在这个帽状结构下方，隐藏着一个神奇的聚焦点，非常适合魔法师使用。 特效：允许使用 召唤孢子幼体.
rows.raw: " A light-colored wood staff about five feet long, multiple mushroom caps bloom out across its bottom and tip. Each mushroom blends into a beautiful array of colors cast over a thick moss, stretching up its length until meeting a wide-brimmed cap. Tucked just beneath the cap out of sight is a magical focus, perfect for magic users. Special Effect: Allows the use of Summon Sporeling."

rows.original: A four-pronged throwing star, intricately etched and designed to look like a flower while being every bit as deadly as it is beautiful. While it would have only been good for harassing enemies were it completely mundane, the gleam upon its edges and the way it returns to the thrower after being set into motion implies that it's more than the gaudy bauble it purports to be. Special Effect: Critical hits made while wielding this weapon gain +50 Crit Effectiveness.
rows.translation: 这种四翼飞镖雕刻精美，其造型看似花朵，却兼具极高的杀伤力与美观性。如果它的边缘没有那种闪烁的光芒，如果它在飞出后不会自动回到投掷者手中，那么它或许只是一种用来骚扰敌人的普通道具罢了。但正是这些独特的设计特点，让它超越了普通装饰品的范畴，展现出别具一格的魅力。 特效使用这种武器进行暴击时，暴击效果的有效性会增加50%。
rows.raw: " A four-pronged throwing star, intricately etched and designed to look like a flower while being every bit as deadly as it is beautiful. While it would have only been good for harassing enemies were it completely mundane, the gleam upon its edges and the way it returns to the thrower after being set into motion implies that it's more than the gaudy bauble it purports to be. Special Effect: Critical hits made while wielding this weapon gain +50 Crit Effectiveness."

rows.original: Fire that bursts from Brienne's gloves at the slightest urging. It wreathes her hands, wrapping around her fingers as though it were a living thing. They don't seem to answer to anyone but the minogirl herself.
rows.translation: 布蕾妮的手套上蕴含着这种火焰，只需稍加催动，它便会喷发而出。这些火焰缠绕着她的双手，紧紧包裹着她的手指，仿佛它们是拥有生命的存在。显然，这些火焰只听从布蕾妮自己的指挥。
rows.raw: "Fire that bursts from Brienne's gloves at the slightest urging. It wreathes her hands, wrapping around her fingers as though it were a living thing. They don't seem to answer to anyone but the minogirl herself."

rows.original: A defensive knife carved from the bone of some gigantic animal inscribed with runes along its hilt. From the make and hide-wrapped grip, you're guessing it might be of jotun origin.
rows.translation: 这把防御用刀具是由某种巨型动物的骨头制成的，刀柄上刻有符文。从它的制作工艺以及用皮革包裹的手柄来看，你可能会猜测它可能是由 jotun 这一种族制造的。
rows.raw: "\n        A defensive knife carved from the bone of some gigantic animal inscribed with runes along its hilt. From the make and hide-wrapped grip, you're guessing it might be of jotun origin.\n        "

rows.original: The pride and joy of the Order of the Oriflamme — or rather, it was. Casual inspection suggests that it's little more than an elaborate sword hilt with far too much gilding, but upon activation by the wielder a blade of burning, blood-red light bursts forth from the guard, dripping malice and capable of cleaving through metal with ease. Guard and pommel alike gleam with an unnatural, menacing light; the sword itself has undoubtedly developed a taste for blood. Holding it, the sensation emanating from the weapon is palpable: the desire for strength, battle and power. Might makes right in this world, and one should not be so squeamish as to acknowledge that truth and exploit it. Special Effect: Allows the use of Sword Soul.
rows.raw: " The pride and joy of the Order of the Oriflamme — or rather, it was. Casual inspection suggests that it's little more than an elaborate sword hilt with far too much gilding, but upon activation by the wielder a blade of burning, blood-red light bursts forth from the guard, dripping malice and capable of cleaving through metal with ease. Guard and pommel alike gleam with an unnatural, menacing light; the sword itself has undoubtedly developed a taste for blood. Holding it, the sensation emanating from the weapon is palpable: the desire for strength, battle and power. Might makes right in this world, and one should not be so squeamish as to acknowledge that truth and exploit it. Special Effect: Allows the use of Sword Soul. "

rows.original: A sharp jolt of searing pain races through your arm as a palpable aura of malice emanates from the fallen Dawnsword. Looks like you're becoming a bit too much of a goody-two-shoes for the weapon's sensibilities. It doesn't quite have the power to stop you from lugging it around, but it can certainly prevent you from wielding it in the service of causes it doesn't like.
rows.raw: "A sharp jolt of searing pain races through your arm as a palpable aura of malice emanates from the fallen Dawnsword. Looks like you're becoming a bit too much of a goody-two-shoes for the weapon's sensibilities. It doesn't quite have the power to stop you from lugging it around, but it can certainly prevent you from wielding it in the service of causes it doesn't like."

rows.original: The pride and joy of the Order of the Oriflamme, granted to that cadre of elite Lumian paladins by the goddess herself. Casual inspection suggests that it's little more than an elaborate sword hilt with far too much gilding, but upon activation by the wielder a blade of blazing brilliance bursts forth from the guard, capable of cleaving through metal with ease. Two decades underground hasn't tarnished it any, and it still gleams as if it were brand new. [pc.swornGod lumia |There's no weapon better suited for a valkyrie like you, the cream of the crop when it comes to the goddess of light's holy warriors. |That it actually works for you says something in and of itself; although whether you personally like the implications is another matter... ] Special Effect: When wielded, this weapon grants the Deflection ability.
rows.raw: " The pride and joy of the Order of the Oriflamme, granted to that cadre of elite Lumian paladins by the goddess herself. Casual inspection suggests that it's little more than an elaborate sword hilt with far too much gilding, but upon activation by the wielder a blade of blazing brilliance bursts forth from the guard, capable of cleaving through metal with ease. Two decades underground hasn't tarnished it any, and it still gleams as if it were brand new. [pc.swornGod lumia |There's no weapon better suited for a valkyrie like you, the cream of the crop when it comes to the goddess of light's holy warriors. |That it actually works for you says something in and of itself; although whether you personally like the implications is another matter... ] Special Effect: When wielded, this weapon grants the Deflection ability."

rows.original: A sharp jolt of searing pain races through your arm as a palpable aura of righteous anger pulses through the Dawnsword. Looks like you've been acting a bit too shady for its tastes, and it wants nothing to do with you. While it can't stop you from lugging it around like a sack of potatoes, it certainly can refuse to allow you to wield it.
rows.raw: "A sharp jolt of searing pain races through your arm as a palpable aura of righteous anger pulses through the Dawnsword. Looks like you've been acting a bit too shady for its tastes, and it wants nothing to do with you. While it can't stop you from lugging it around like a sack of potatoes, it certainly can refuse to allow you to wield it."

rows.original: A blade that shimmers like a forged aurora. The weapon feels solid in your hand, but you get the sense that it's only real in this mindscape. Special Effect: Increases your Attack Power, Spellpower, or Sexiness based on the highest of your corresponding attributes (Strength, Willpower, or Presence, respectively). Currently increasing
rows.translation: 一把仿佛被锻造出的极光般闪烁的刀刃。握在手中时，这种武器给人的感觉十分结实，但你会觉得，它其实只存在于这个幻想的世界之中。 特效会根据你相应属性中最高的那个数值来提升你的攻击力、法力值或魅力值。目前，这一效果正在发挥作用。
rows.raw: " A blade that shimmers like a forged aurora. The weapon feels solid in your hand, but you get the sense that it's only real in this mindscape. Special Effect: Increases your Attack Power, Spellpower, or Sexiness based on the highest of your corresponding attributes (Strength, Willpower, or Presence, respectively). Currently increasing "

rows.original: The greatspear that once saved a dragon. This weapon is large, but rather than feeling unwieldy it settles in the hands like an extension of the self. Apart from the winged guard, it looks no different than an average spear, but its aura is true to its status as a relic. Special Effect: On hit, gain a
rows.translation: 那柄曾拯救过一条巨龙的巨矛。这件武器体积庞大，但使用起来却毫不笨重，它仿佛成为了使用者手中的一部分。除了那对翼状护手外，它看起来与普通的矛并无二致，但它所散发出的气息，确实证明了它是一件珍贵的遗物。 特效被击中时，获得……
rows.raw: " The greatspear that once saved a dragon. This weapon is large, but rather than feeling unwieldy it settles in the hands like an extension of the self. Apart from the winged guard, it looks no different than an average spear, but its aura is true to its status as a relic. Special Effect: On hit, gain a "

rows.original: HP shield. If you already have a shield, regain
rows.raw: " HP shield. If you already have a shield, regain "

rows.original: A brace of throwing daggers that seem to have a mind of their own. Each blade is shot through with silver and gold veins that make the whole ensemble resemble a beautifully feathered wing. You can feel wind and sun alike dancing in your hands when you hold them, and each one returns to the brace after being thrown. Special Effect: Grants immunity to the Disarmed effect.
rows.translation: 这是一对仿佛拥有自主意识的投掷匕首。每把匕首的表面都布满了银色与金色的纹路，使得整件武器看起来就像一只羽毛华丽的翅膀。当你握住它们时，能感受到风与阳光仿佛都在你的手中跳跃；而每一把匕首在投掷之后都会自动回到这个配饰上。 特效：使目标获得“解除武装”效果带来的免疫能力。
rows.raw: " A brace of throwing daggers that seem to have a mind of their own. Each blade is shot through with silver and gold veins that make the whole ensemble resemble a beautifully feathered wing. You can feel wind and sun alike dancing in your hands when you hold them, and each one returns to the brace after being thrown. Special Effect: Grants immunity to the Disarmed effect. "

rows.original: A magical flanged mace of gold and bronze, containing the soul of %"Bringer of Ash, The Fire That Renews The Forest and Scourges Foes."
rows.translation: 一把由黄金与青铜制成的魔法法兰锤，其中蕴含着“灰烬使者——那能重燃森林之火、惩罚敌人的存在”的灵魂。
rows.raw: 'A magical flanged mace of gold and bronze, containing the soul of %"Bringer of Ash, The Fire That Renews The Forest and Scourges Foes."'

rows.original: A burned charcoal foci that forms a twisting curl of axe shaped lightning. It never keeps a solid shape, twisting and writhing like a living thing. If the focus is lost, the axe will dissipate.
rows.translation: 一团燃烧的木炭形成的能量焦点，会扭曲成斧头状的闪电。它从未保持过稳定的形态，总是像有生命的东西一样不断蠕动、扭曲。如果这个能量焦点消失，那道闪电就会消散殆尽。
rows.raw: "A burned charcoal foci that forms a twisting curl of axe shaped lightning. It never keeps a solid shape, twisting and writhing like a living thing. If the focus is lost, the axe will dissipate."

rows.original: A two-handed, double-headed greataxe pulled from an armory with little in the way of distinctions, but when wielded by anyone wearing the Adjudicator clothing, the weapon becomes electrified, imbued with the power of storms. Agnimitra can create guitar strings made of pure lightning along the axe’s handle to play... well, something akin to music.
rows.translation: 这把双手持、双头的大型战斧从军械库中取出时，并没有什么特别之处，但只要是由身穿“裁决者”服饰的人使用，这把武器就会充满电能，仿佛蕴含着风暴的力量。阿格尼米特拉甚至可以在战斧的柄上制造出由纯粹闪电构成的琴弦，用来演奏……嗯，某种类似于音乐的东西。
rows.raw: "A two-handed, double-headed greataxe pulled from an armory with little in the way of distinctions, but when wielded by anyone wearing the Adjudicator clothing, the weapon becomes electrified, imbued with the power of storms. Agnimitra can create guitar strings made of pure lightning along the axe’s handle to play... well, something akin to music."

rows.original: Designed and enchanted to weaken enemy armor, rivulets of fire flow down from the toes of this large, double-headed axe. Electrum runes, meanwhile, line the weapon's cheeks and glow with a pale red light.
rows.translation: 这种大型双头斧经过特殊设计，其刃部会释放出火焰，从而削弱敌人的护甲；同时，武器两侧刻有电银符文，这些符文会散发淡红色的光芒。
rows.raw: "Designed and enchanted to weaken enemy armor, rivulets of fire flow down from the toes of this large, double-headed axe. Electrum runes, meanwhile, line the weapon's cheeks and glow with a pale red light."

rows.original: Perhaps the most simple weapon ever devised, this club is little more than a refined stick. Still, it's light enough to be wielded in one hand but sturdy enough to be used as a weapon. [silly|It's the perfect weapon to bonk a bitch with twice.]
rows.translation: 这或许是有史以来最简单的武器了，这种棍棒其实只不过是一根经过改良的木棍而已。不过，它的重量轻到可以单手使用，同时又足够结实，完全可以作为武器来使用。 [silly|这可真是用来揍女人的完美武器啊。 两次.]
rows.raw: "Perhaps the most simple weapon ever devised, this club is little more than a refined stick. Still, it's light enough to be wielded in one hand but sturdy enough to be used as a weapon. [silly|It's the perfect weapon to bonk a bitch with twice.]"

rows.original: A hammer perfectly weighted for use in combat. With bludgeoning power practically designed to slam through armor, what more could a [silly|dwarven|raging] barbarian ask for from their one-handed bludgeoning weapons?
rows.translation: 一把经过精心设计的战斗用锤子。它的击打力量足以轻易穿透盔甲，还有什么比这更理想的呢？ [silly|矮人|狂暴的] 野蛮人会用他们那些单手挥舞的棍棒武器来索取什么吗？
rows.raw: "A hammer perfectly weighted for use in combat. With bludgeoning power practically designed to slam through armor, what more could a [silly|dwarven|raging] barbarian ask for from their one-handed bludgeoning weapons?"

rows.original: [silly|This stick is made for bonking, and that's just what it'll do.|A massive piece of wood that's designed and weighted for use in combat by people willing to use two hands. It'll definitely leave its mark on anyone the unwieldy club manages to hit.]
rows.raw: "[silly|This stick is made for bonking, and that's just what it'll do.|A massive piece of wood that's designed and weighted for use in combat by people willing to use two hands. It'll definitely leave its mark on anyone the unwieldy club manages to hit.]"

rows.original: A titanic smithing hammer made of stone and mystical crystal, once wielded by the forge golem of Dracia. This hammer was used to craft blades of legend and armor made of dragonscale, but lay forgotten in Cloudreach Tower for centuries after the island's fall. It still carries the heat of the forge within its enchanted facets, waiting to be unleashed on the anvil or on your foes.
rows.translation: 这把由石头与神秘水晶制成的巨型锻造锤，曾由德拉西亚的锻造魔像使用。这把锤子曾被用来打造传说中的刀刃以及由龙鳞制成的铠甲，但在岛屿陷落之后，它被遗弃在云达塔中，沉睡了几个世纪。如今，它的每一面都还蕴含着锻造时的高温，等待着在铁砧上发挥作用，或是用来击败你的敌人。
rows.raw: "\n        A titanic smithing hammer made of stone and mystical crystal, once wielded by the forge golem of Dracia. This hammer was used to craft blades of legend and armor made of dragonscale, but lay forgotten in Cloudreach Tower for centuries after the island's fall. It still carries the heat of the forge within its enchanted facets, waiting to be unleashed on the anvil or on your foes."

rows.original: While pale elf bowyers favor whitewood when one wants to impress, wood from silverthorn saplings is favored for its suitability for shortbows. Bows crafted from silverthorn wood are powerful for their size, better suited to close quarters, and more easily concealed; what they lack in power compared to whitewood greatbows and longbows can be made up for with poison drawn from the silverthorn tree's flowers. Special Effect: Basic attacks target Physical Resistance instead of Evasion and apply Poisoned for 2 turns on hit.
rows.raw: " While pale elf bowyers favor whitewood when one wants to impress, wood from silverthorn saplings is favored for its suitability for shortbows. Bows crafted from silverthorn wood are powerful for their size, better suited to close quarters, and more easily concealed; what they lack in power compared to whitewood greatbows and longbows can be made up for with poison drawn from the silverthorn tree's flowers. Special Effect: Basic attacks target Physical Resistance instead of Evasion and apply Poisoned for 2 turns on hit."

rows.original: Aim for the stars. Special Effect: The power of the cosmos at your beck and call; on any action target each enemy's Evasion to deal
rows.raw: " Aim for the stars. Special Effect: The power of the cosmos at your beck and call; on any action target each enemy's Evasion to deal "

rows.original: A Minoan legionnaire's gladius. This one has been hoisted in victory time and time again, its hilt worn and weathered... but never broken. Special Effect: While wielding this weapon, your attacks ignore 20% of the target's Armor.
rows.translation: 这是一把米诺斯军团士兵使用的短剑。它曾在无数次胜利中被高高举起，剑柄早已被磨损和风化……但却从未折断过。 特效在使用这种武器时，你的攻击会忽略目标20%的护甲值。
rows.raw: " A Minoan legionnaire's gladius. This one has been hoisted in victory time and time again, its hilt worn and weathered... but never broken. Special Effect: While wielding this weapon, your attacks ignore 20% of the target's Armor."

rows.original: A light and wieldy shortbow of Kitsuhon make. This particular bow was wielded by the Faceless Blade, an assassin of the Demon Cult, who carried it to the Marches all the way from her abandoned homeland. It is the weapon of an assassin shooting from the shadows, and is far more precise than most weapons of its ilk. Its arrows are enchanted with a dark vitriol that disrupts spellcasting, making it uniquely suitable for slaying mages. Special Effect: Critical Hits with this weapon inflict Silence for 2 turns.
rows.translation: 这把由 Kitsuhon 制造的短弓轻便且易于使用。这把特殊的弓曾由恶魔教派的刺客“无面之刃”使用，她从自己被遗弃的故乡一路带着它来到了边境地区。这种武器非常适合在暗处潜行进行刺杀，其精准度远超同类武器。箭矢上还被施加了某种黑暗的诅咒，这种诅咒会干扰施法者的法术发挥，因此这种弓特别适合用来击杀法师。 特效使用这种武器造成的暴击会使敌人陷入沉默状态，持续2个回合。
rows.raw: " A light and wieldy shortbow of Kitsuhon make. This particular bow was wielded by the Faceless Blade, an assassin of the Demon Cult, who carried it to the Marches all the way from her abandoned homeland. It is the weapon of an assassin shooting from the shadows, and is far more precise than most weapons of its ilk. Its arrows are enchanted with a dark vitriol that disrupts spellcasting, making it uniquely suitable for slaying mages. Special Effect: Critical Hits with this weapon inflict Silence for 2 turns."

rows.original: A polearm with a wavy bronze blade, set with a pair of malachite stones in its tang and decorated with flowing ribbons. These graceful weapons are a common sight among Jassiran paladins, who first faced the glaive in the fallen land of Arkacia and went on to adopt it as a weapon perfect for a servant of the Lord of Dance.
rows.translation: 这种长柄武器拥有波浪状的青铜刀刃，刀柄上镶嵌着一对孔雀石，同时还装饰着飘逸的丝带。这种优雅的武器在贾西兰的圣骑士们中十分常见——他们最初是在阿卡西亚这片沦陷的土地上首次接触到这种武器，后来便将其视为最适合“舞蹈之主”仆从使用的武器而广泛采用起来。
rows.raw: "A polearm with a wavy bronze blade, set with a pair of malachite stones in its tang and decorated with flowing ribbons. These graceful weapons are a common sight among Jassiran paladins, who first faced the glaive in the fallen land of Arkacia and went on to adopt it as a weapon perfect for a servant of the Lord of Dance."

rows.original: A heavy, sturdy oakwood staff reinforced with brass plates nailed through the haft, and even a sweeping pair of horns that function like a crossguard. This is clearly the implement of a warrior-mage, unafraid to stand solidly in the vanguard of battle. Special Effect: When you take damage, you gain a +20 bonus to Armor/Ward/Focus for 2 turns. This effect cannot trigger again until it has ended.
rows.raw: " A heavy, sturdy oakwood staff reinforced with brass plates nailed through the haft, and even a sweeping pair of horns that function like a crossguard. This is clearly the implement of a warrior-mage, unafraid to stand solidly in the vanguard of battle. Special Effect: When you take damage, you gain a +20 bonus to Armor/Ward/Focus for 2 turns. This effect cannot trigger again until it has ended."

rows.original: A sword-like embodiment of Rimescore which emerges from a crystalline cluster at the edge of a metallic hilt. Cloth twines about the cold-iron handle, providing its wielder with a solid grip and a small reprieve from the frozen metal. Exuding out from the crystalline blade, frozen air spews out like breath from a living creature, billowing forth steadily and rhythmically. When you look at it, you can't shake the feeling that [pc.itemIsEquipped PolarEdge |you're also looking at yourself |it's looking back at you ]. One thing's for certain, though: the glacial might of this crystalline sword is undeniable. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold.
rows.translation: 这把剑，正是Rimescore的化身——它的剑身源自金属剑柄边缘的结晶簇中。柔软的布条缠绕在冰冷的铁柄上，既为使用者提供了稳固的握感，也让他们能够稍微远离那冰冷坚硬的金属触感。从那结晶状的剑刃中，仿佛有冷空气不断喷涌而出，就像生物在呼吸一样，稳定而有节奏地流淌着。每当你注视着它的时候，都会不由得产生这样一种感觉…… [pc.itemIsEquipped PolarEdge |你也在审视自己。 |它在注视着你。 ]不过，有一点是肯定的：这种水晶剑所蕴含的强大力量是不可否认的。 特效：允许使用 寒冰锥.
rows.raw: " A sword-like embodiment of Rimescore which emerges from a crystalline cluster at the edge of a metallic hilt. Cloth twines about the cold-iron handle, providing its wielder with a solid grip and a small reprieve from the frozen metal. Exuding out from the crystalline blade, frozen air spews out like breath from a living creature, billowing forth steadily and rhythmically. When you look at it, you can't shake the feeling that [pc.itemIsEquipped PolarEdge |you're also looking at yourself |it's looking back at you ]. One thing's for certain, though: the glacial might of this crystalline sword is undeniable. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold."

rows.original: This spear-like embodiment of Rimescore is entirely crystalline and cold to the touch; it's not a pole you want to stick your tongue to. Frozen air exudes from this weapon like breath from a living creature, billowing forth steadily and rhythmically; through force of will, you can shape the spear so it's long and smooth — perfect for throwing or puncturing — or cause sharp fractal growths to erupt from haft or point. When you look at it, you can't shake the feeling that [pc.itemIsEquipped GlacialSpike |you're also looking at yourself |it's looking back at you ]. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold.
rows.raw: " This spear-like embodiment of Rimescore is entirely crystalline and cold to the touch; it's not a pole you want to stick your tongue to. Frozen air exudes from this weapon like breath from a living creature, billowing forth steadily and rhythmically; through force of will, you can shape the spear so it's long and smooth — perfect for throwing or puncturing — or cause sharp fractal growths to erupt from haft or point. When you look at it, you can't shake the feeling that [pc.itemIsEquipped GlacialSpike |you're also looking at yourself |it's looking back at you ]. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold."

rows.original: A large, translucent crystal chunk which floats and follows you at shoulder height. Exuding out from the crystalline chunk, frozen air spews out like breath from a living creature, billowing forth steadily and rhythmically. As you observe the gently floating crystal, you can't shake the feeling that [pc.itemIsEquipped Hoarfrost |you're also looking at yourself |it's looking back at you ]. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold.
rows.translation: 一块巨大的、半透明的水晶块，会漂浮在你身旁，其高度与你的肩膀相当。从这块水晶中不断释放出冰冷的空气，这些空气就像生物呼出的气息一样，稳定而有节奏地向外流淌。当你注视着这块轻轻漂浮的水晶时，你无法摆脱这样的感觉…… [pc.itemIsEquipped Hoarfrost |你也在审视自己。 |它在注视着你。 ]. 特效：允许使用 寒冰锥.
rows.raw: " A large, translucent crystal chunk which floats and follows you at shoulder height. Exuding out from the crystalline chunk, frozen air spews out like breath from a living creature, billowing forth steadily and rhythmically. As you observe the gently floating crystal, you can't shake the feeling that [pc.itemIsEquipped Hoarfrost |you're also looking at yourself |it's looking back at you ]. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold."

rows.original: This crystalline sword radiates with magical, frozen energy. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold.
rows.translation: 这把水晶剑散发着充满魔力的、冰冷的能量。 特效：允许使用 寒冰锥.
rows.raw: " This crystalline sword radiates with magical, frozen energy. Special Effect: Allows the use of Cone of Cold."

rows.original: A long-hafted axe with a pair of blades that, though made of copper, shine like radiant gold. Between the blades are wound a number of ever-living rosevines; the scent they emit is far more sensual, and more potent, than any natural flower's. You claimed this weapon from an abandoned temple hidden in Harvest Valley, dedicated to

You claimed this weapon from an abandoned temple hidden in Harvest Valley, dedicated to "
